payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Close-up of a pair of dark brown stained wooden cabinet doors with recessed rectangular panels and a narrow frame; matte-to-satin finish with minor surface reflections, visible vertical seam between the two doors, and slight edge-cropping at the image border — appears to be photographed at close range (≈0.8 m).
